summary_en: infoNet Inc. will acquire all shares of ActiveLitech Corp. (3DCG, XR, digital twin, web development) through direct purchase of 150 shares and stock-for-stock exchange for the remaining 1,050 shares, completing subsidiary acquisition by June 19, 2026.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Shares and Stock Exchange to Make ActiveLitech Corp. a Wholly-Owned Subsidiary and Changes in Major Shareholders
translation_en_brief:
On May 19, 2026, infoNet Inc. announced a two-step acquisition to make ActiveLitech Corp. a wholly-owned subsidiary. ActiveLitech, established in 2021, operates in architectural 3D CG, VR/AR (XR) applications, digital twin solutions, web application development, and 3D scanner sales. The company leverages 30+ years of accumulated 3DCG technology and holds a leading position in architectural CG with major relationships across major real estate developers.

The acquisition structure involves: (1) direct share purchase of 150 shares from multiple sellers including Focus Capital (represented by infoNet's Board Chairman Emura Masato) and Star Land Communication by June 19, 2026; (2) subsequent stock-for-stock exchange covering the remaining 1,050 shares of ActiveLitech's 1,200 outstanding shares. infoNet aims to integrate ActiveLitech's technical capabilities with its existing corporate communication solutions (web strategy, consulting, AI-enabled analytics) to strengthen competitive positioning and enable future transition to a holding company structure.
